title: Compute Nodes
subtitle: Approved Ubuntu nodes with an outbound-connected agent. The local host is always present.
empty_hint: Create an enrollment token and set up the node agent on the target host.

selector.label: Target node
selector.hint: Defaults to the local host. Remote nodes must be online and capable.

enroll.title: Pair node
enroll.intro: Create a one-time enrollment token. The node agent uses it exactly once to enroll.
enroll.token_warning: Copy the token now. It will not be shown again.
enroll.token_next: On the target host: run hydrahive-node enroll with this token, then approve it in the node list.

approve.title: Approve node
approve.intro: Confirm the certificate fingerprint the node showed during enrollment. The node is approved only on an exact match.
approve.field_fingerprint_hint: sha256:… — exactly as shown by the agent

confirm.drain_body: The node stops accepting new activation jobs. Running workloads remain; stop/delete/inspect stay available.
confirm.disable_body: The node is marked disabled and accepts no more jobs.
confirm.revoke_body: The node identity is permanently revoked. The agent can no longer connect. This cannot be undone.
